paper_title: Study Design and Development of Chronologies

methods.method_name: Tree Ring Width (TRW) Data Collection and Preparation
methods.description: This method involves collecting and preparing tree ring width data from oak trees to study growth patterns and their relationship with hydroclimate variables.

steps.description: Four datasets of oak TRW series were utilized for the purposes of this study.
steps.searchable_summary: utilize four datasets of oak TRW series

steps.description: The CWS dataset consisted of TRW series from northern Bavaria (Germany), sampled by Muigg et al. (2020b).
steps.searchable_summary: collect CWS dataset from northern Bavaria

steps.description: Stem disks were collected from two actively managed CWS forest stands near Weigenheim and Welbhausen.
steps.searchable_summary: collect stem disks from CWS forest stands

steps.description: Detect signals of CWS in the individual TRW series using the adapted growth averaging method.
steps.searchable_summary: detect CWS signals using growth averaging method

steps.description: Apply a standardized scanning for growth releases at an average chronological interval of 26-36 years with less than 5 years standard deviation on the TRW data.
steps.searchable_summary: scan for growth releases in TRW data

steps.description: Merge the CWS and HF datasets to assess the hydroclimate signal of a hypothetical chronology.
Assemble a 'random dataset' by merging the full TRW datasets of WITT, BAME, and Lohr.
steps.searchable_summary: assemble random dataset from TRW datasets

steps.description: Prepare samples with standard dendrochronological methods.
Measure TRW with a precision of 0.01 mm using a movable object table and record using the program Berlin Muehle 4 1.0.
steps.searchable_summary: measure TRW with precision and record data

steps.description: Crossdate the TRW series with PAST software.
steps.searchable_summary: crossdate TRW series using PAST software

methods.description: This method involves detrending tree ring width data and developing chronologies to analyze growth patterns and their correlation with hydroclimate variables.

steps.description: Test three different detrending methods on the combined dataset after removing auto-correlation.
steps.searchable_summary: test detrending methods on combined dataset

steps.description: Develop four average TRW chronologies using the bi-weight robust mean.
steps.searchable_summary: develop TRW chronologies using bi-weight robust mean

steps.description: Test the quality of the developed chronologies and relationships with hydroclimate variables.
steps.searchable_summary: test quality of chronologies and hydroclimate relationships

steps.description: Calculate descriptive statistics EPS, rbar, and SNR for the detrended chronologies.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate EPS, rbar, and SNR for chronologies
